verses.text: Keimah in ka huh, ka teel, ka lungkimna ka nasempa en un. Ka kha tawh amah ka kidimsak a, amah in minam khempeuh tungah thuman tungsak ding hi
Amah kiko loin, a aw zong sangsak lo ding a, kongzing lakah zong thu gen zakzak lo ding hi
Amah in a zawngkhal mite dop bawl ding a, a cimawh mite tungah migi ding hi. Amah in thumanna tawh mi khempeuh tungah thutang thu semkhia ding hi
Amah in leitungah thutang thu a phuh khit matengin lungsi lo, lungkia lo ding hi. Tuipi gei-a om gamte in ama thu ngak uh hi

Vantungte piangsakin a zal, leitung phahin, a tung panin a hong paikhia nate a piangsak, leitungah a om mite tungah husan'na pia-in, leitungah a paite khempeuh husan'na a guan' Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi

“Kei pen Topa ka hi a, thumanna tawh nangmah hong samin, ka khut tawh hong lenin nang ka hong kem hi. Mittawte a vaksak ding, leinuai thong sung panin thongkiate a lakhia ding, thong sung a mialna munah a tu mite a lakhia ding, mite tungah thuciamna ahi ding, minam dangte tungah khuavak ahi dingin nang ka hong koih khin hi
“Kei pen Topa ka hi a, Topa pen keima min ahi hi. Pasian dang' tungah keima-a' tawh a kibang minthan'na ka pia kei a, a kisui milimte zong keimah hong kiphatnate pawl ka ngahsak kei hi
En un, hun beisa-a nate in hong khengta a, tu-in a thak nate kong gen hi. Tuate a hong pian'khiat ma-in note tungah a thute ka hong genkhol hi,” a ci hi.
Topa' tungah la thak sa un la, leimong panin amah phatna sa un! Tuipi leh a sunga omte, tuipi gei-a om gamte leh a tunga teng mite aw, la sa un
Sehnel gam leh a khuapite, Kedar mite' ten'na khuaneute a aw uh sangkhai sak un. Sela gama teng mite lungdamna tawh la sasak un la, mual dawn panin amaute awngsak un
Topa' minthan'na gensak un la, tuipi gei-a gamte-ah amah phatna gensak un
Mi thahatpa bangin Topa kuankhia a, gal a do mipa bangin ama hehna sosak hi. Amah kiko-in nakpi takin awngkhia a, ama hatna a galte tungah a lak hi

Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: “Sauveipi sung bangmah hihloin ka om a, keimah leh keimah kikhamcipin ka om hithiat hi. Tu-in ahih leh numei nausuak ding bangin ka kikokhia ding a, ka kam ka-in ka tungnak ding hi
Mual liante leh mual neute ka susia ding a, a po khempeuh ka keusak ding hi. Gunte pen tuikulh ka suaksak ding a, bualtuite ka kangsak ding hi

“Amau' theihloh lampi-ah mittawte ka paipih ding a, amau' theih ngeiloh sul zuihpihin ka kha ding hi. Amau' mai-ah khuamial pen khuavak suaksakin, a phokna munte a tamin ka bawl ding hi. Hihte pen keima hih ding nate hi a, tuate sem loin ka nusia kei ding hi
A kisui milimte muangin, a kisung milimte kiangah, ‘Note, komau' pasian-te na hi uh hi,’ a ci mite kinolh ding a, maizum mahmahin ki-omsak ding hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Israel in Khalna tawh Phattuam Ngahlo

verses.text: “Bilngongte aw, za un. Mittawte aw, na muh theihna dingun en un
Ka nasempa bangin kua a mit taw a, keima sawl ka kamtaipa bangin kua a bil ngong ahi hiam? Keima thuciampihpa bangin kua a mit taw a, Topa' nasempa bangin kua a mit taw ahi hiam
Israel in na tampi mu a, ahih hangin tuate encian lo hi. Ama bilte vang a, ahih hangin amah in khua zalo hi,” a ci hi
Topa pen a honkhia nuam mahmah Pasian hi a, ama thuhilhnate limtakin a kizuih ding a deih hi

Ahih hangin ama mite pen a kiluh, a kisut mite hi a, leihawm sungah amaute khempeuh kikhiasuk a, thonginn sungah kiseel hi. Amaute pen a hon ding a omlo, nek dingin a kiman ganhing suakmangkhin uh a, kuamah in, “Hong piakik in,” a cihloh vankinusiate a suak khinta uh hi
Note lakah khat peuhpeuh in hih thu na ngai ding uh hiam? Tu-a kipanin limtakin na ngai ding uh hiam

Kua in a sutgawppa tungah Jakob pia a, a luhgawpte tungah Israel pia ahi hiam? Topa mahmah in a piak hilo ahi hiam? Ama tungah eite i khial hi. Ama hong deih bangin i nungta kei a, ama hong thuhilhnate i mang kei hi

Tua ahih ciangin amah in ama hehna so leh galkidonate eite tungah hong tungsak hi. Israel mi khempeuh lakah ama hehna mei bangin hong kuang a, ahih hangin eite in bangmah i thei kei hi. Tua bang i thuakna hangin eite in bangmah i phawk thei tuan kei hi.
